arts.ttl: Phil Foden hits back at Man City criticism with clear double response after Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester City being beaten Liverpool at Anfield has led to manager Pep Guardiola and the players receiving plenty of criticism after losing six of their last seven matches across all competitions

arts.ttl: 'They are so fast': Pep Guardiola names five Liverpool players who Man City just couldn't deal with
Don’t rule them out – Mikel Arteta says Man City could still challenge for title
arts.sum: The Gunners host Ruben Amorim’s United nine points adrift of table-topping Liverpool, but two points clear of Pep Guardiola’s City.

arts.ttl: Here's what Pep Guardiola can learn from Sir Alex Ferguson about how to rescue Man City, writes IAN HERBERT
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: He offered a jocular reply about the local property market before declaring that managing in such a place would be 'not a problem. Not a problem at all.'

arts.ttl: “We will talk” – Pep Guardiola updates press on Man City future ahead of January
arts.sum: Man City and Pep Guardiola are in an unprecedented position as the Premier League champions have lost their last four games in the competition, which has left a lot of questions ahead of the January transfer window. The Manchester outfit were beaten convincingly on Sunday by title rivals Liverpool and the setback at Anfield has […] The post “We will talk” – Pep Guardiola updates press on Man City future ahead of January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta believes Man City can still challenge for title: ‘Don’t rule them out’
arts.sum: Arsenal host Manchester United and Ruben Amorim nine points adrift of leaders Liverpool

arts.ttl: Rodri names player he would sign for Man City
arts.sum: Rodri has named the player he would bring to restore Manchester City's greatness.

arts.ttl: Manchester City to feature in Dare to Defy documentary series, powered by Nissan
arts.sum: In this episode, Adele Roberts visits CITC’s team, attends the One City Disability Sessions, as well as the Official Supporters Club, Canal Street Blues (CSB), to learn more about the work being done by the Club to further break down barriers for the LGBTQ+ community. Manchester City and long-standing partner Nissan have teamed up to showcase the Club's continued support for the LGBTQ+ community as part of a new 'Dare to Defy' documentary series, powered by Nissan.

arts.ttl: Major Man City FIFA Club World Cup update as 11 opponents ruled out and Lionel Messi reality clear
arts.sum: Manchester City travel to the USA next summer for the FIFA Club World Cup, and will learn their group stage opponents in Thursday's draw.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool would jump at chance to sign £83m superstar, Man City contacted his camp recently
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester City are in the queue...
